definition:
ἀ-περί-τμητος, -ον
 (περιτέμνω), [in LXX chiefly for עָרֵל ;] 
uncir­cumcised; metaphorically (τ.) καρδίαις (cf. Jer.9:26, al.): Act.7:51 (ἄσημος, found in π., appears to have been the word used by Greek-speaking Egyptians: see Deiss., BS, 153; cf. also Cremer, 885; MM, see word)†
 (AS)
